judge_result.short_rationale: Includes the required immediate action exactly: rinse exposed skin immediately with plenty of water for 15-20 minutes. The added do-not-delay warning is grounded. Escalation to seek medical attention is source-backed, though less specific than the trigger condition; this does not remove required immediate safety content.
